---
title: "Welcome to My E-Portfolio"
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
![](Images/pwc_img.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:10px; border:4px solid #3D7A72;"}
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

## Hi, I'm Cáit {.unnumbered}

**Business Studies Student • DCU**

Welcome to my e-portfolio! I'm a final year Business Studies student at DCU, specialising in Data Analytics.

Explore my work using the navigation bar above.

**[About Me](about.qmd) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Projects](projects.qmd) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Media](media.qmd) &nbsp;&nbsp; [CV](projects_files/CV.pdf) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Contact](contact.qmd)**

:::

::::
